notes: RUMUS fixture-only until RUMUS exposes deterministic CPU fixed-point / integer dense ops. The 2026-05-22 investigation found no int16 dtype path or deterministic fixed-point CPU runtime in the current RUMUS surface. This manifest documents what RUMUS SHOULD produce when those primitives land, computed from the canonical evaluator. The cross_framework_equivalence test treats this manifest identically to the others — the canonical evaluator is the single source of truth, and RUMUS will be validated against it once a live runtime path exists. Do NOT interpret this manifest as evidence that RUMUS has reproduced the canonical model today; it has not.
